entry.title: New: RES26-092 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT TO THE CITY OF ONE HIGH-BACKED TRADITIONAL BENCH, PREPARATIONS OF THE GROUNDS, AND A BRONZE PLAQUE WITH AN INSCRIPTION TO READ, "DONATED BY THE FAMILY OF GAFATASI J.W.E. VEU," VALUED AT $2,716.74 FROM SERENA VEU TO BE PLACED AT SANDY BEACH PARK.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
